prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `84f2aca1`.
codex_response:
The rule is: detect hollow monochrome rectangular frames whose interior consists entirely of `0`s, then recolor the interior to `5` when it has size `1`, or to `7` when it has size `2`. The summary hint was used because it matched the official examples; no correction note was needed.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84f2aca1/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84f2aca1/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84f2aca1/generator.py#L1). The generator stays on-family by only creating sparse `3x3`, `3x4`, and `4x3` box-perimeter frames, using the same limited frame colors and empty-background layouts seen in the official task. No new shared primitive was added.

Verification passed on both gates: official examples `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`. I also checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/84f2aca1/previews/preview_01.png) visually, and the outputs look consistent with the source family.
